name: Mike Zhen
description: Technology generalist at heart well-versed in efficient utilizations of various tools & frameworks to solve complex problems. Specialize in full-stack development and cloud transformation with proven record of leading cross-functional teams to build scalable enterprise solutions.

Spearheaded observability initiative across multiple domains, architecting data ingestion pipelines from 15+ critical sources to establish a unified telemetry foundation — accelerating incident resolution and building technical use cases for enterprise-wide observability adoption

Served as architecture advisor for 5-8 engineering teams within the enterprise monitoring domain, conducting system architecture reviews, surface non-functional requirements, and resolve complex technical and organizational obstacles blocking delivery
Established architectural coaching practice for engineers across partner integration workstreams, accelerating delivery cadence while upholding design quality standards
Led a cross-functional team of engineers in the design and delivery of a secure external-facing web portal, enabling 10+ co-brand partners to access contractual reporting and business analytics
Architected and implemented a scalable group-based authorization model to enforce strict multi-tenant data isolation across all external partner users — eliminating unauthorized data access risk
Drove engineering excellence across the team through code reviews and technical workshops in cloud-native and modern web patterns — improving codebase maintainability and reducing review cycle time

Engineered a high-concurrency serverless data pipeline to process 20M+ customer records daily into a mission-critical Stand-In Processing (STIP) database, ensuring data availability for authorization decisions

Designed and implemented critical identity verification features for agent servicing platform using Kotlin and Angular, partnering closely with business stakeholders to ensure 100% compliance with evolving AML regulatory requirements
Built high-performance internal services using Golang and Docker to aggregate data across fragmented enterprise silos, enabling centralized architecture analytics for strategic planning decisions

Partnered with cloud architect to design comprehensive migration plans for 8 vendor applications, ensuring seamless cloud migration into AWS and achieving overall reduction in recovery time objectives (RTO)
Automated end-to-end cloud infrastructure provisioning and application deployment using Jenkins, Terraform, and Ansible, improving deployment time and eliminating manual configuration errors
Developed custom Python automation to encrypt legacy data-at-rest across multiple AWS services, successfully closing security compliance gaps ahead of native AWS control availability
Developed internal MEAN stack web application from inception and hybrid mobile prototype using Ionic, establishing reusable frameworks that cut future project onboarding time

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Engineering
